summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Mi Hogar Home Cleaning landing page. All required features working perfectly on both desktop and mobile.
passed_tests: Navigation menu displays correctly with all 5 required links (HOME, SERVICES, ABOUT US, LOCAL FOCUS, GET A QUOTE)
Logo with heart icon and 'Mi hogar Home Cleaning' text renders properly
Hero section displays with correct background image and titles ('TRUSTWORTHY HOME CARE, BOW VALLEY LOCAL' and 'WE CLEAN YOUR HOME LIKE OUR OWN')
Services section shows all 3 service cards (Residential Cleaning, Carpet & Upholstery, Specialized) with custom icons
Footer displays map placeholder with Canmore location, contact info (+234-556-8890, mi-hogar@gmail.com), bilingual text, and flags
Mobile responsiveness works perfectly with collapsible navigation menu
All navigation links are clickable and functional
Page loads without errors on both desktop and mobile viewports
All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing
Visual design is professional with appropriate color scheme and typography
